title: Cooking 5 Meals You'll Actually Eat
summary: Use a repeatable meal system instead of collecting random recipes.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: Your fridge keeps filling with ingredients you never finish.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: You are exhausted by deciding what to cook every evening.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: You need a system of five repeat meals, not endless variety.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Pick five recipes with overlapping ingredients and one prep day.

Optimize for low-effort execution on tired weekdays, not ideal weekends.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find supermarkets and food markets near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Making Friends in a City Where Everyone's Busy - routine creates room for people.
